welcome.title: Welcome to Olhar de Tutor!
welcome.body: This app helps you proactively track your pet's health. Want a quick tour?

nav.title: Navigation
nav.body: Use this menu to navigate between sections of the app.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.body: Record daily observations about your pet. This builds a history that helps detect changes.

ready.title: You're all set!
ready.body: Explore each section to better care for your pet. You can restart this tour in Profile preferences.

header.title: Daily check-in
header.body: Here you record daily observations about feeding, sleep, behavior, and more.

form.title: Take your time
form.body: Use the sliders to indicate how your pet did in each category. This is a record, not a diagnosis.

submit.title: Save the check-in
submit.body: Saving calculates a daily score and logs it in your history so you can track trends.

header.title: Educational guides
header.body: Educational content to help you better understand your pet's behavior and health.

list.title: Available modules
list.body: Tap any module to read it. There's also an alert signs list for emergency situations.

vet.title: Always consult a vet
vet.body: This app does not replace veterinary care. Use this shortcut to find a vet near you.

header.title: Health agenda
header.body: Track vaccines, dewormings, consultations, and other health events for your pet.

addBtn.title: Add an event
addBtn.body: Tap here to add a new event with a date, type, and optional reminder.

colors.title: Color-coded urgency
colors.body: Overdue events appear in red, the next 7 days in amber, and future ones in gray.

petCard.title: Your pet
petCard.body: Your pet's info: name, species, breed, and auto-calculated age.

streak.title: Check-in streak
streak.body: How many consecutive days you've done a check-in. Keeping it going helps spot patterns.

weight.title: Weight history
weight.body: Record your pet's weight periodically. The chart shows how it evolves over time.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: Adjust language and audio speed. You can also export your data or delete your account.
